d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

failed_attempts:
constructor <;> intro h <;> simp_all [MState.exp_val]
  case mp =>
    have h1 : (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m).inner (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      simp [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm, Matrix.trace_sub, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.mul_sub]
      nlinarith [ρ.zero_le, ρ.trace_one, MState.pure_mul_self ψ, h]
    exact HermitianMat.eq_of_inner_self_eq_zero _ h1
  case mpr =>
    simp [MState.pure_mul_self]

constructor <;> intro h <;> simp_all [MState.exp_val]
  case mp =>
    have h1 : ρ.M = (MState.pure ψ).M := by
      have h2 : (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
        simp [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_sub, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.mul_sub, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
        nlinarith [ρ.M.inner_le_one, MState.pure_mul_self ψ, h]
      exact HermitianMat.inner_eq_zero_iff.mp h2
    exact MState.ext h1
  case mpr =>
    rw [h]
    simp [MState.pure_mul_self]

constructor
  · intro h
    have h1 : ρ.M = (MState.pure ψ).M := by
      have h2 : (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
        simp_all [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.trace_mul_comm]
        nlinarith [ρ.trace_one, MState.pure_trace_one ψ, ρ.positive, MState.pure_positive ψ]
      exact HermitianMat.eq_of_inner_self_eq_zero (ρ.M - (MState.pure ψ).M) h2
    cases ρ; cases ψ; congr; exact h1
  · rintro rfl
    simp [MState.exp_val, MState.pure_mul_self]
